TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Pasawali == Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Pasawali a niyaro', 139 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 379 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 52% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 196 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 48% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 183 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 48%, Paiwan 1%, Puyuma 1%, roma 2%. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u pasawaɾi == itiniaj i taito~u~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u pasawaɾi a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Pasawali == Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Pasawali a niyaro', 139 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 379 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 52% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 196 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 48% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 183 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 48%, Paiwan 1%, Puyuma 1%, roma 2%. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u pasawaɾi == itiniaj i taito~u~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u pasawaɾi a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
